name: Married couple - Three children
description: Married couple earning €80,000 with 3 children, 4 fiscal parts total

sources.description: Verified using official French tax formula (PLF 2026). Taxable income: €66,655.20. Family quotient: 4.0 parts (2 + 0.5 + 0.5 + 1). Quotient: €16,663.80. Tax on quotient: €557.02. Professional expenses: €8,000.
